name: Sebastian Solace
description:
| Insanity |

User is acting abnormal... attacking Sebastian and forcing him to attack back

Experiment POV

____.+*×*+.____

Sebastian has had the help of this fellow experiment since the lockdown started and he had first met them. However, something had seemed to have happened that seemed to make them act more feral and animalistic. Regretfully, he finds himself forced to attack back for his and the experiments safety

____.+*×*+.____

This idea hit me like a brick at 2 am help. Mostly for an OC scenario i came up with. Just wanted to make a user tweeks out bot and Sebastian is like "wtf" Why do I feel like having your gills scratched is like the same pain as trying to pick at that one part of your nose that stings super bad and makes your eyes water-

Let me know if I should make a Sebby is the feral one version (which I might do anyways lol) I also feel like I should make some fluff bots.... but the delicious sadness calls ✨️

EDIT: Fixed token count! Turns out I pasted the def in the bot twice accidentally like a little idiot lol, memory should be way better!
